approach_taxonomy.promotion_gate: only byte measurement and exact decode count
approach_taxonomy.risk: context/model bytes can silently exceed gain
approach_taxonomy.use: long-range sparse contexts, context mixing, arithmetic-coding style evidence

approach_taxonomy.promotion_gate: route cost < incumbent with decoder/residual/witness counted
approach_taxonomy.risk: route explosion without admissible lower bounds
approach_taxonomy.use: enumerate transform routes with lower bounds and prune dominated branches

approach_taxonomy.promotion_gate: event must become an executable route with exact rehydration
approach_taxonomy.risk: signal analogy mistaken for compression evidence
approach_taxonomy.use: detect residual-collapse events in noisy candidate forests

approach_taxonomy.risk: Phi gain treated as universal law
approach_taxonomy.use: choose log/saturating/Hill/low-exponent response by measured error
guide structured recovery when RIP-like or separability conditions exist

approach_taxonomy.promotion_gate: latent + residual + uncertainty bytes beat baseline
approach_taxonomy.risk: generator becomes hidden payload or biased source substitute
approach_taxonomy.use: replace plain sparsity with learned low-dimensional priors

approach_taxonomy.promotion_gate: invertibility guard, support check, residual closure
approach_taxonomy.use: reduce representation error and expose uncertainty in inverse route charts

approach_taxonomy.promotion_gate: decoded hash closes and memory/kernel bytes counted
approach_taxonomy.use: short descriptor plus exact residual, graph harmonics, bounded history

approach_taxonomy.promotion_gate: features only choose routes; bytes decide
approach_taxonomy.risk: feature score promoted without codec trial
approach_taxonomy.use: route chunks by spectral, transient, autocorrelation, DCT, phase, and similarity roots
avoid false merges; classify beautiful/ugly/horrible compression regimes

approach_taxonomy.promotion_gate: source bytes, retained bytes, quality delta, provenance
approach_taxonomy.risk: lossy summary sold as exact compression
approach_taxonomy.use: prune prompts, use symbolic cells, use compressed proxy views

approach_taxonomy.promotion_gate: built-site payload measurement with exact plugin config
approach_taxonomy.risk: architecture reduction confused with content compression
approach_taxonomy.use: pre-render static HTML, omit heavy framework runtime, gate plugins, externalize search index

claim_boundary: This synthesis proposes testable route-shaping experiments. It is not a Hutter Prize result, not proof of a new compressor, and not a guarantee that signal features will improve wiki8.
failure_rules: feature score treated as byte gain -> invalid
sidecar, witness, residual, decoder, or container bytes omitted -> invalid receipt
latent/generative prior used as hidden source payload -> invalid
semantic merge without round-trip or contradiction check -> hold
history kernel unbounded or uncounted -> fail closed
docmd-style staticization reported as Hutter compression -> overclaim
negative controls omitted from new route claim -> weak claim

immediate_experiment_ladder.action: extract per-chunk signal features and compare feature clusters to bz2/zstd outcomes
immediate_experiment_ladder.name: wiki8_signal_feature_baseline
immediate_experiment_ladder.success: feature clusters predict which chunks benefit from which existing codec route

immediate_experiment_ladder.action: choose among existing routes only: raw, bz2, zstd, xml_token+bz2, tokenbook+bz2 if available
immediate_experiment_ladder.name: route_classifier_without_new_codec
immediate_experiment_ladder.success: classifier beats always-bz2 after classifier sidecar bytes

immediate_experiment_ladder.action: apply semantic/topology guards before tokenbook merge
immediate_experiment_ladder.name: topology_guard_tokenbook
immediate_experiment_ladder.success: bad merges fall while byte gain remains non-negative

immediate_experiment_ladder.action: export a small tiddler/article slice to static pages plus external index
immediate_experiment_ladder.name: docmd_static_wiki_slice
immediate_experiment_ladder.success: lower initial payload than live surface with same navigability

immediate_experiment_ladder.action: route stream chunks with finite fractional residual memory
immediate_experiment_ladder.name: bounded_history_scheduler
immediate_experiment_ladder.success: history-aware route choice beats memoryless route after history bytes

new_candidate_patterns.candidate_equation: route = argmin_r LB(r | phi_signal(chunk), topology_regime, history_state)
new_candidate_patterns.first_test: wiki8 chunk sweep with features: entropy, XML tag density, DCT energy, transient edges, autocorrelation, cosine reuse
new_candidate_patterns.novelty: combine signal invariant roots with DD route search
new_candidate_patterns.promotion_gate: chosen route beats bz2/zstd baseline after feature/witness bytes
new_candidate_patterns.shape: chunk -> feature vector -> route family -> codec trial -> exact residual
new_candidate_patterns.why_it_popped: signal roots supply cheap morphology; DD supplies admissible route discipline

new_candidate_patterns.candidate_equation: payload_total = html_static + js_core + css_core + selected_plugin_assets + index_external
new_candidate_patterns.first_test: build a small TiddlyWiki/article slice both live and static; compare initial gzip payload and search index cost
new_candidate_patterns.novelty: treat docmd-style no-runtime output as a compression prepass for wiki/tiddler publishing
new_candidate_patterns.promotion_gate: same navigation/search affordance with lower initial payload
new_candidate_patterns.shape: tiddlers/articles -> static route pages + external search index + manifest
new_candidate_patterns.why_it_popped: payload shrinks by not shipping dynamic state; maps to gated leaves in DD

new_candidate_patterns.candidate_equation: C = bytes(z) + bytes(model_id) + bytes(residual) + bytes(witness) + bytes(decoder)
new_candidate_patterns.first_test: small structured corpus slice with tokenbook latent IDs and exact residual lane
new_candidate_patterns.novelty: use generative/flow priors only as proposals with explicit latent/residual byte accounting
new_candidate_patterns.promotion_gate: C < incumbent and decoded hash equals source hash
new_candidate_patterns.shape: latent z proposes transform; exact residual repairs; uncertainty decides hold
new_candidate_patterns.why_it_popped: generative and invertible priors are useful only when they stop hiding model state

new_candidate_patterns.candidate_equation: h_t = sum_{tau<t, window W} K_alpha(t-tau) * residual_tau; route_t = R(chunk_t, h_t)
new_candidate_patterns.first_test: stream wiki8 chunks; compare memoryless route choice vs bounded-history route choice
new_candidate_patterns.novelty: bounded-memory scheduler for nonstationary corpus regions
new_candidate_patterns.promotion_gate: history bytes are counted and improve total compressed size
new_candidate_patterns.shape: route choice depends on recent route residuals through a finite fractional kernel
new_candidate_patterns.why_it_popped: fractional dynamics and cognitive overload both say history changes threshold response

new_candidate_patterns.first_test: compare tokenbook merges with and without contradiction/torsion holds on docs/tiddlers
new_candidate_patterns.novelty: use beautiful/ugly/horrible semantics as a pre-code safety gate
new_candidate_patterns.promotion_gate: fewer bad merges without losing byte wins
new_candidate_patterns.shape: fold when invariants align, prune when quality loss bounded, isolate when torsion high
new_candidate_patterns.why_it_popped: semantic compression needs a tear detector before it creates false tokenbooks

new_candidate_patterns.candidate_equation: promote iff positive route beats baseline and matched negative control fails or underperforms
new_candidate_patterns.first_test: for each new transform, include a deliberately bad route with same sidecar budget
new_candidate_patterns.novelty: borrow CAD/DNA force-probe discipline for compression experiments
new_candidate_patterns.promotion_gate: positive gain survives against negative control
new_candidate_patterns.shape: route hypothesis -> measurable perturbation -> negative control -> receipt
new_candidate_patterns.why_it_popped: the CAD frame made measurement and negative controls explicit; compression routes need the same habit

primary_read: Across the local compression, compressed-sensing, signal-root, semantic-topology, and docmd payload notes, the new pattern is not another universal compressor. It is a signal-shaped route compiler: shape the route space before coding, then pay exact residual, witness, decoder, and container bytes after coding.

unifying_equations.exact_cost: C_total = bytes(payload) + bytes(sidecar) + bytes(residual) + bytes(decoder) + bytes(witness) + bytes(container)
unifying_equations.negative_control: valid_gain iff C(candidate) < C(baseline) and C(candidate) < C(matched_bad_route)
unifying_equations.promotion: promote iff H(decode(r*)) == H(source) and C_total < incumbent and failure_rules == none
unifying_equations.route_selection: r* = argmin_r LB(r | phi_signal(c), semantic_regime(c), history_state)
unifying_equations.signal_feature_vector: phi_signal(c) = [H(c), tag_density(c), DCT_energy(c), transient(c), autocorr(c), cosine_reuse(c)]

what_is_actually_new: The strongest new move is route-space signal shaping, not a new compressor.
docmd reframes compression as runtime-state omission: do not ship branches you can rebuild.
Signal invariant roots give a concrete feature surface for choosing routes before spending codec time.
Semantic topology supplies a guard against destructive tokenbook merges.
Generative/invertible models should be restricted to proposal charts with explicit residual byte accounting.
Every interesting analogy becomes useful only after it is paired with a negative control and exact decode receipt.
